debug_info.goal:
case h
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
hmax : IsMin D
x y : PersistenceSubmodule M
hxy : Disjoint x y
hN : x ⊔ y ∈ D
hx : ¬x = ⊥
hy : ¬y = ⊥
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := fun N hN => if N = x ⊔ y then {x, y} else {N}
newD : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M :=
  @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B ⋯ ⋯ ⋯
h : {x, y} = {x ⊔ y}
⊢ False

proof:
have hxy_mem : x ⊔ y ∈ ({x, y} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := by rw [h]; exact Set.mem_singleton _
    simp only [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hxy_mem
    rcases hxy_mem with hxy_eq | hxy_eq
    · have : y ≤ x := by rw [← hxy_eq]; exact le_sup_right
      have : y = ⊥ := disjoint_comm.mp hxy |>.eq_bot_of_le this
      exact hy this
    · have : x ≤ y := by rw [← hxy_eq]; exact le_sup_left
      have : x = ⊥ := hxy.eq_bot_of_le this
      exact hx this

    have hy_in : y ∈ ({x, y} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := Set.mem_insert_of_mem x rfl
    rw [h] at hy_in
    simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy_in
    rw [hx_in, hy_in] at hxy
    simp only [disjoint_self] at hxy
    exact hy hxy

exact hx (hx_mem.symm ▸ hxy)

have hxy_mem : x ⊔ y ∈ ({x, y} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := by rw [h]; exact Set.mem_singleton _
    simp only [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hxy_mem
    cases hxy_mem with
    | inl hxsup =>
      have : y ≤ x := by rw [← hxsup]; exact le_sup_right
      have : y = ⊥ := disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp hxy.symm ▸ inf_of_le_right this
      exact hy this
    | inr hysup =>
      have : x ≤ y := by rw [← hysup]; exact le_sup_left
      have : x = ⊥ := disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp hxy ▸ inf_of_le_right this
      exact hx this
